data.title: WhiteHawk to acquire PHX Minerals in $187M deal
data.description:
PHX Minerals (NYSE:PHX) +19.3% post-market Thursday after natural gas mineral and royalty company WhiteHawk agreed to acquire the company for $4.35/share in cash, a 21.8% premium to PHX’s closing price on May 7, for a total value of ~$187M including debt.

WhiteHawk said the deal will add 1.8M gross unit acres of premier natural gas mineral and royalty assets, significantly expanding its footprint in the core of the Haynesville shale in Texas and Louisiana and diversifying its portfolio into the SCOOP/STACK region in Oklahoma.

Following the deal closing, WhiteHawk will own royalty interests across ~3.1M gross unit acres, with cash flow from 10,163 producing wells, 368 wells-in-progress, 330 permitted wells and more than 7,250 undeveloped locations across its portfolio, on a pro forma basis.

data.title: PDF Solutions Non-GAAP EPS of $0.21 beats by $0.03, revenue of $47.8M beats by $0.28M
data.description:
• PDF Solutions press release (NASDAQ:PDFS): Q1 Non-GAAP EPS of $0.21 beats by $0.03.
  • Revenue of $47.8M (+15.7% Y/Y) beats by $0.28M.
  • Shares +1.73% AH.

  • Financial Outlook

    “The first quarter of 2025 saw strong customer activity and platform development, driven by AI-driven digitization. Sapience Manufacturing Hub saw record bookings, and we acquired secureWISE to enhance supply chain collaboration. Our platform - spanning analytics, AI/Model Ops, enterprise connectivity, and supply chain tools - empowers customers to handle today’s complex manufacturing and testing environments and data requirements. With a strong portfolio and momentum, we reaffirm our 21-23% annual revenue growth prior guidance range for this year,” said John Kibarian, CEO and President.

data.title: IBEX Holdings Non-GAAP EPS of $0.82 beats by $0.10, revenue of $140.7M beats by $9.47M
data.description:
• IBEX Holdings press release (NASDAQ:IBEX): Q3 Non-GAAP EPS of $0.82 beats by $0.10.
  • Revenue of $140.7M (+11.0% Y/Y) beats by $9.47M.
  • The company has authorized a share repurchase plan to commence May 12, 2025 under which it may repurchase up to $15M of its shares over the next 12 months.

data.title: Power Solutions Non-GAAP EPS of $0.83 beats by $0.37, revenue of $135.45M beats by $28.85M
data.description:
• Power Solutions press release (NASDAQ:PSIX): Q1 Non-GAAP EPS of $0.83 beats by $0.37.
  • Revenue of $135.45M (+42.3% Y/Y) beats by $28.85M.

  • Outlook for 2025

    The Company anticipates an increase in sales for 2025 compared to 2024, driven by expected growth in the power systems end market including products supporting data centers, while sales in the industrial and transportation end markets are projected to remain about flat. However, due to ongoing geopolitical and macroeconomic uncertainties, PSI will not provide specific sales growth guidance for 2025

  • Shares +7.02% AH.
